heading: Trusted by the Community
description: Hear from Doctors who've optimized their factory lines with our planner.

reviews.text: I was spending hours trying to figure out ratios for HC Valley Batteries. This tool calculated everything in seconds. My factory runs at 100% now.
reviews.author: DoctorKnight

reviews.text: The connection schema feature is incredible. I just follow the diagram and my production lines are perfectly balanced every time.
reviews.author: AmiyaLover42

reviews.text: Coming from Factorio, I needed a tool like this for Endfield. The recipe tree view feels just like home. Absolutely essential.
reviews.author: FactorioGuru
